metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for AI task management, safety guard hooks, and UE5 material authoring

plugins.name: taskmaster
plugins.description: Universal AI-powered task and backlog management. Kanban viewer, session tracking, worktree isolation, dependency graphs, and quality gates. Drop into any project. Requires: uv (https://docs.astral.sh/uv/)

plugins.name: guard-hooks
plugins.description: Safety guard hooks that block destructive CLI commands and sensitive file edits, with in-flow user approval via UserPromptSubmit. Requires: jq (https://jqlang.github.io/jq/)

plugins.name: ue5-materials
plugins.description: Author UE5 materials from YAML. Live mode drives the Material Editor via MCPBridge (localhost:13580); clipboard mode emits T3D paste text. HLSL Architect (Opus) + Node Generator (Sonnet) agent chain for complex designs, direct YAML for simple wiring. Requires: pyyaml.

plugins.name: statusline
plugins.description: Pastel statusline for Claude Code with rate-limit bars, git status, context usage, update notifications, and session cost. Bash + PowerShell. Run /statusline:setup after install. Requires: jq (Bash only).
